description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a prominent upper enclosure made of gray, concrete-like panels. The main body sits atop a lighter-colored, wood-textured platform that extends outward, creating a small overhang. A set of wooden steps leads up to an open entryway at the front, flanked by two vertical side panels. The kiosk is positioned on a square, patterned base that resembles tiled flooring, providing stability and a defined footprint. The upper enclosure appears open at the top, possibly for ventilation or service, and the overall design is utilitarian with minimal decorative elements. There are no visible windows or signage, and the roof is flat and integrated with the upper structure.
description: A compact, modern kiosk with a gray upper enclosure, wood-textured platform, and front steps, set on a tiled base. The design is functional and minimal, with no visible signage or windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden steps, open entryway, and overhanging platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid gray panels and the depth of the upper enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel and the absence of entry or windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuous gray panels and the platform's overhang.
attribute_roof_design: flat roof integrated with upper enclosure, no overhangs or decorative features, concrete-like material
